input.command:

set -e
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  mc alias set local http://minio.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local:9000 "$MINIO_ROOT_USER" "$MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD" && break
  sleep 2
done
mc mb -p local/es-backups
mc ls local
'

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  serviceName: es-transport
  replicas: 3
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1000
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-permissions
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data"]
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
        - name: set-max-map-count
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144 || true"]
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
            privileged: true
        - name: install-plugins
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              if [ ! -d /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins/repository-s3 ]; then
                bin/elasticsearch-plugin install --batch repository-s3
              fi
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          volumeMounts:
            - name: plugins
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins
        - name: build-config
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              cp /tmp/config-src/elasticsearch.yml /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              mkdir -p /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
              cp /tmp/certs-src/tls.crt /tmp/certs-src/tls.key /tmp/certs-src/ca.crt /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/
              bin/elasticsearch-keystore create
              echo "$(cat /tmp/secure-settings/access_key)" | bin/elasticsearch-keystore add --stdin --force s3.client.default.access_key
              echo "$(cat /tmp/secure-settings/secret_key)" | bin/elasticsearch-keystore add --stdin --force s3.client.default.secret_key
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          volumeMounts:
            - name: esconfig
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config
            - name: config-src
              mountPath: /tmp/config-src
              readOnly: true
            - name: certs-src
              mountPath: /tmp/certs-src
              readOnly: true
            - name: secure-settings
              mountPath: /tmp/secure-settings
              readOnly: true
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9200
            - name: transport
              containerPort: 9300
          env:
            - name: node.name
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-password
                  key: password
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1.5Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
            - name: esconfig
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config
            - name: plugins
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE '^(200|503)$'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} https://localhost:9200/ | grep -qE '^(200|401)$'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
      volumes:
        - name: config-src
          configMap:
            name: es-config
        - name: certs-src
          secret:
            secretName: es-http-tls
        - name: secure-settings
          secret:
            secretName: es-secure-settings
        - name: esconfig
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: plugins
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  serviceName: es-transport
  replicas: 3
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1000
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-permissions
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data"]
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
        - name: set-max-map-count
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144 || true"]
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
            privileged: true
        - name: install-plugins
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              if [ ! -d /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins/repository-s3 ]; then
                bin/elasticsearch-plugin install --batch repository-s3
              fi
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          volumeMounts:
            - name: plugins
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins
        - name: build-config
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              cp /tmp/config-src/elasticsearch.yml /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              mkdir -p /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
              cp /tmp/certs-src/tls.crt /tmp/certs-src/tls.key /tmp/certs-src/ca.crt /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/
              bin/elasticsearch-keystore create
              echo "$(cat /tmp/secure-settings/access_key)" | bin/elasticsearch-keystore add --stdin --force s3.client.default.access_key
              echo "$(cat /tmp/secure-settings/secret_key)" | bin/elasticsearch-keystore add --stdin --force s3.client.default.secret_key
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          volumeMounts:
            - name: esconfig
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config
            - name: config-src
              mountPath: /tmp/config-src
              readOnly: true
            - name: certs-src
              mountPath: /tmp/certs-src
              readOnly: true
            - name: secure-settings
              mountPath: /tmp/secure-settings
              readOnly: true
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9200
            - name: transport
              containerPort: 9300
          env:
            - name: node.name
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-password
                  key: password
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1.5Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
            - name: esconfig
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config
            - name: plugins
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE '^(200|503)$'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} https://localhost:9200/ | grep -qE '^(200|401)$'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
      volumes:
        - name: config-src
          configMap:
            name: es-config
        - name: certs-src
          secret:
            secretName: es-http-tls
        - name: secure-settings
          secret:
            secretName: es-secure-settings
        - name: esconfig
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: plugins
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi
